title: A High-Order Immersed Boundary Technique for Computational Aeroacoustics
description: Conference presentation on a high-order immersed boundary method for computational aeroacoustics (with V. Fortuné, D. Marx, and C. Prax).

title: Identification of Aeroacoustics Sources with Data Assimilation
description: Conference presentation on aeroacoustic source identification using data assimilation (with R. Marchiano and J.-C. Chassaing).

title: Aeroacoustic Source Identification with Effects of Solid Boundaries Using a Numerical Time-reversal Technique
description: Conference presentation on numerical time-reversal for aeroacoustic source identification with solid boundaries (with Y. Zhou, R. Marchiano, D. Marx, C. Prax, and V. Valeau).

title: A Nonlinear Conservative System for Describing Highly Nonlinear Acoustic Waves in Heterogeneous Media
venue: International Conference in honor for the 90th birthday of Sergei K. Godunov
description: Conference presentation on the succesfull generalization of the homogeneous media model into heterogeneous media. (with M.A. Solovchuk, and T.W.H. Sheu).

title: Best Paper Presentation, NHRI Research Day
description: Awarded Best Paper Presentation at NHRI Research Day for work on nonlinear acoustics and multi-GPU solvers developed during the NSC postdoctoral fellowship.

title: Asymptotic-Preserving WENO Schemes for Boltzmann Model Equations and Rarefied Gas Flow Simulation
venue: Korea Society of Computational Fluids Engineering
description: Conference presentation on asymptotic-preserving WENO schemes for Boltzmann model equations and rarefied gas flows (with J.-Y. Yang, W.Y. Kang, and J.C. Huang).

title: High-order Numerical Descriptions of Nonlinear Acoustics Propagations on Multiple GPUs
venue: Parallel Computational Fluid Dynamics Conference, ParCFD 2017
description: Conference presentation on high-order numerical descriptions of nonlinear acoustics propagations on multiple GPUs (with M.A. Solovchuka, and T.W.H. Sheu).

title: A Numerical investigation on the contribution of local nonlinear effects
description: Conference presentation on a study of local nonlinear effects in acoustics (with D. Diaz,   M.A. Solovchuka, and T.W.H. Sheu).

title: Direct Modelling of Rarefied Quantum Gases in Arbitrary Flow Regimes with Semi-classical Boltzmann-BGK Equation
description: Conference presentation on a direct approach to model Quantum rarefied gases using a Boltzmann-BGK model equation (with J.-Y. Yang, and J.C. Huang).

title: High-order Asymptotic-preserving Scheme for Solving Boltzmann-BGK Model Equation
venue: 1th World Congress on Computational Mechanics (WCCM XI), 5th European Conference on Computational Mechanics (ECCM V), 6th European Conference on Computational Fluid Dynamics (ECFD VI)
description: Conference presentation to introduce a new high-oder Asymptotic-preserving scheme for solving classical Boltzmann-BGK model. (with Min-Hung Chen and Jaw-Yen Yang).

title: Computations of Rarefied Gas Flows of Arbitrary Statistics Using an Accurate Direct Solver for Semiclassical Boltzmann-BGK Equation
venue: Eighth International Conference on Flow Dynamics
description: Conference presentation on the legacy direct solver approach for modeling Quantum rarefied gases using Boltzmann-BGK equation (with Jaw-Yen Yang, and Bagus P. Muljadi).
